# Hustle & Rise - Robots.txt
# Allow Google and all search engines to crawl the entire site

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /.netlify/
Disallow: /.astro/
Disallow: /node_modules/

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://hustleandrise.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl delay (courtesy)
Crawl-delay: 1

# Google-specific
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

# Bing-specific
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Sitemap: https://wealthwise.com/sitemap-index.xml

# Google specific
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 0

# Bing specific
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
